steps.title: Write the percent equations
steps.content:
Translate the two statements as $a=2.8b$ and $a=0.85c$. Because both expressions equal $a$, set them equal:
$$2.8b=0.85c$$

steps.title: Express c as a percent
steps.content: Solve for $c$ in terms of $b$: $$c=\frac{2.8}{0.85}b=\frac{56}{17}b$$ The percent value is about $329.41$, so the closest value is $329$. The answer is D.
